response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, open-source contributions, and leadership in diverse projects, but lacks demonstrated experience in IT consulting, client-facing architecture advisory, and German language proficiency (only basic), which are critical for this role; his UML and requirements management experience are also unmentioned.
strengths: Extensive open-source leadership with GISCollective and multiple DLang libraries
Proven full-stack expertise across languages, platforms, and DevOps tooling
Strong track record in mentoring, workshops, and technical knowledge sharing
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, not meeting C1 requirement
No clear evidence of IT consulting experience or client architecture advisory
Missing explicit mention of UML, requirements management, or compliance/security frameworks
